base_url.description: Breezy API root override for tests or proxies. The per-company base URL is base_url + /company/<company_id>.

api_key.description: Breezy HR raw API key, sent verbatim as the Authorization header value; never logged.

company_id.description: Breezy company id. Not a credential by nature (it is a path segment, not a secret value used for auth), but marked x-secret to match the legacy catalog's field classification.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
